event: 从宾夕法尼亚大学设计学院毕业，获得城市规划（智慧城市方向）硕士学位和综合产品设计证书
event_en: Graduated from the University of Pennsylvania’s School of Design with a Master’s degree in Urban Planning (Smart Cities track) and a Certificate in Integrated Product Design

event: 作为第二作者参与论文《文化传承视角下老城街巷餐饮空间布局研究-- 以广州为例》 并发表至中国城市规划年会
event_en: Contributed as the second author to the paper “A Study on the Spatial Layout of Dining Establishments in Old City Streets from the Perspective of Cultural Heritage: A Case Study of Guangzhou,” which was presented at the Annual Conference on Urban Planning in China
